name: Dino World Building Blocks Set
description: A 150-piece building block set featuring colorful dinosaurs, trees, and landscape pieces. Great for motor skills and imaginative play.

name: Smart Touch Baby Piano
description: Interactive piano with lights, animal sounds, and classical melodies. Features soft touch keys perfect for little hands.

name: Luxury Baby Stroller X1
description: Premium lightweight stroller with reversible seat, UPF 50+ canopy, and smooth suspension. Easy one-hand fold.

name: Organic Cotton Sleepsuit (Pack of 3)
description: Ultra-soft, breathable 100% organic cotton sleepsuits with two-way zippers for easy diaper changes.

name: Interactive Arabic Alphabet Tablet
description: Educational tablet teaching Arabic letters, numbers, and basic words with fun songs and quizzes.

name: Giant T-Rex Plush Toy
description: A 60cm tall soft T-Rex plush. Cuddly and safe with embroidered eyes.

name: Deluxe Baby Care Gift Basket
description: A beautiful basket containing organic baby wash, lotion, diaper cream, soft towels, and a plush bunny.

name: STEM Robotics Kit for Beginners
description: Build your own moving robot. Introduces basic mechanics and engineering concepts. Safe snap-together parts.

name: Silicone Feeding Set (Plate, Bowl, Spoon)
description: BPA-free suction plates and bowls to prevent spills. Includes a soft silicone spoon for sore teething gums.

name: Wooden Montessori Sorter Toy
description: Classic wooden shape sorter with 12 colorful blocks. Helps develop hand-eye coordination and shape recognition.

name: Mother's Relaxing Spa Set
description: A thoughtful gift for moms. Includes lavender bath salts, a soothing eye mask, and organic body butter.

name: Bedtime Storybook Collection (EN/AR)
description: A set of 5 beautifully illustrated bilingual bedtime stories in English and Arabic.

name: High Contrast Baby Gym
description: Play mat with high contrast black, white, and red patterns. Includes dangling sensory toys to encourage reaching.

name: Magnetic Tiles 100-Piece Set
description: Colorful magnetic building tiles that snap together to create 3D structures. Promotes creativity.

name: Premium Diaper Bag Backpack
description: Stylish and functional diaper bag with insulated bottle pockets, changing pad, and stroller straps.
